restaurants.name: The Mainlander
restaurants.notes: Resy returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) on all parameterized URL attempts; WebSearch fallback returned no slot-level data. Open Wed–Sat only with fixed seatings at 6:00 PM and 8:30 PM; only 6:00 PM seating checked per scope (8:30 PM excluded). Sundays not applicable (May 31, Jun 7). Reservations open on the 1st of each month at noon and sell out quickly — enable Resy Notify Me for cancellations. Verify manually: https://resy.com/cities/st-louis-mo/venues/mainlander?date=YYYY-MM-DD&seats=2
